# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
  "name": "acme/app",
  "description": "Application with automated setup and asset compilation",
  "type": "project",
  "license": "proprietary",
  "require": {
    "php": "^8.1"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "post-install-cmd": [
      "@setup"
    ],
    "post-update-cmd": [
      "@setup"
    ],
    "setup": [
      "@php -r \"file_exists('.env') || copy('.env.example', '.env');\"",
      "@php -r \"is_dir('var') || mkdir('var', 0775, true); is_dir('public/assets') || mkdir('public/assets', 0775, true);\"",
      "@php scripts/setup.php",
      "@download-assets",
      "@compile-assets"
    ],
    "download-assets": [
      "@php -r \"is_dir('public/assets/vendor') || mkdir('public/assets/vendor', 0775, true);\"",
      "@php -r \"$u='https://example.com/assets/vendor.min.js'; $d='public/assets/vendor/vendor.min.js'; $c=@file_get_contents($u); if($c===false){fwrite(STDERR,'Failed to download '.$u.PHP_EOL); exit(1);} file_put_contents($d,$c);\"",
      "@php -r \"$u='https://example.com/assets/vendor.min.css'; $d='public/assets/vendor/vendor.min.css'; $c=@file_get_contents($u); if($c===false){fwrite(STDERR,'Failed to download '.$u.PHP_EOL); exit(1);} file_put_contents($d,$c);\"",
      "@php -r \"$u='https://example.com/assets/logo.svg'; $d='public/assets/logo.svg'; $c=@file_get_contents($u); if($c===false){fwrite(STDERR,'Failed to download '.$u.PHP_EOL); exit(1);} file_put_contents($d,$c);\""
    ],
    "compile-assets": [
      "@sh -lc \"if command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm ci && npm run build; else echo 'npm not found; skipping asset build'; fi\"",
      "@sh -lc \"if command -v yarn >/dev/null 2>&1; then yarn install --frozen-lockfile && yarn build; fi\"",
      "@php scripts/post_install.php"
    ]
  },
  "config": {
    "sort-packages": true,
    "optimize-autoloader": true,
    "preferred-install": {
      "*": "dist"
    }
  }
}
